zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Fitton於大約1210年出生在英國爾時，他的父親John de Fitton32歲，母親Margery32歲。他和Diana至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1294年享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Fitton于大约1210年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲John de Fitton32岁，母亲Margery32岁。他和Diana至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1294年享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Fitton was born about 1210, in Cheshire, England, his father, John de Fitton, was 32 and his mother, Margery, was 32. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Diana. He died about 1294, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Fitton est né environ 1210, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Fitton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margery, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Diana. Il est décédé environ 1294, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Fitton um 1210 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Fitton 32 und seine Mutter Margery 32. Er hatte mit Diana mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1294 im Alter von 86 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Fitton è nato il circa 1210 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John de Fitton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margery, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Diana. Morì circa 1294, all'età di 86 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Fitton(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Fitton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Diana(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1294년 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Fitton nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Fitton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margery, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Diana. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1294, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Fitton родился около 1210 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Fitton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margery, 32. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Diana. Он умер около 1294 г. в возрасте 86 лет.
